MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge Pro Tem: Paul Perdue, Clerk: A. Mok, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Winnie Kwong is present.
Attorney Jeffrey A. Chen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Baby Ruth Aliposa, Ruffa Anne Aliposa, Judy Aliposa, and Edgardo Aliposa are present.
Attorney James Reilly appearing for the defendant Judy Aliposa in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Dec 21, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
